scenarios.title: Terminal orchestration
scenarios.summary: Open, run, monitor, and clean up multiple terminals as one coordinated workflow.
executionGuidance: Use runMany when the user asks for several terminals; otherwise use run for one command.
After starting work, observe with tail/list before summarizing.
Stop or close temporary terminals only when the user asks or the scenario is explicitly cleanup-oriented.

scenarios.title: Layout rearrangement
scenarios.summary: Resize windows and dock panes, arrange groups, and set artifact targets for realistic Desk layouts.
executionGuidance: Prefer window preset first for test reliability, then dock size and arrange calls.
Use artifactTarget.set before Gowoori/XCON generation when the user wants a stable render area.

scenarios.title: File system automation
scenarios.summary: Read, preview, apply, restore, and verify local or remote file changes safely.
executionGuidance: For writes, preview first and explain the diff before applying.
For remote writes, expect external approval and verify with read-back.

scenarios.title: Capture and report generation
scenarios.summary: Capture panes, include web snapshots, assemble XCON Markdown, and export reports.
executionGuidance: Capture the active pane first unless the user names a specific pane.
Use create/createFromContent before exportPdf when the user asks for a document report.
Validate that capture thumbnails are non-empty before claiming visual success.

scenarios.title: Multi-agent delegation
scenarios.summary: Start external agent sessions, enable automation filters, and supervise approval requests.
executionGuidance: Make delegation explicit: which agent, which working directory, and what success signal.
Do not approve write/execute actions silently when they came from external agents.

scenarios.title: Gowoori pipeline control
scenarios.summary: Let Xenesis Agent generate XCON/SKETCH artifacts, then validate, show, hide, overlay, and export them through Gowoori surfaces.
executionGuidance: Xenesis Agent owns artifact generation through /artifact; use Gowoori as the render target.
Use GowooriChat only when Xenesis Agent cannot complete the flow or the user explicitly asks for GowooriChat.
If the user asks to see it bigger, offer artifact pane and overlay paths.

scenarios.title: Diagnostics and self-healing
scenarios.summary: Inspect services, record diagnostics, restart components, export bundles, and kill stale processes.
executionGuidance: Observe service status first; restart only when the status indicates failure or the user explicitly asks.
Export diagnostics before destructive cleanup when possible.

scenarios.title: Workspace switching
scenarios.summary: Save the current workspace, clear panes, restore another workspace, and align explorer/agent context.
executionGuidance: Save before switching unless the user says to discard the current workspace.
After switching, confirm explorer location and Xenesis workspace context.

scenarios.title: Remote control chain
scenarios.summary: Route external channel requests through gateway, safety, Desk actions, and response delivery.
executionGuidance: Treat remote execute requests as external and approval-gated.
Return clear safety and result messages suitable for the originating channel.

scenarios.title: Extension management
scenarios.summary: List, enable, disable, reload, and run extension commands.
executionGuidance: List extensions before enabling/disabling so the user sees exact IDs.
Reload only after state-changing extension operations.

scenarios.title: Explorer navigation
scenarios.summary: Navigate, filter, open, preview, and add selected files to AI context.
executionGuidance: Navigate first, then filter/select/open.
Use addSelectedToContext when the next AI answer should reason over selected files.

scenarios.title: Playwright web automation
scenarios.summary: Capture external pages, run browser actions, save traces, and turn web results into reports.
executionGuidance: Use snapshot for read-only inspection and run for click/fill/navigation flows.
Capture the resulting pane or save trace artifacts when validating visual flows.

scenarios.title: Settings and security management
scenarios.summary: Read, save, import/export, backup/restore settings and manage Xenesis profiles.
executionGuidance: Read current settings before save/import.
Use backups for rollback-oriented setting changes.

scenarios.title: Command palette control
scenarios.summary: List and run command palette actions as programmable Desk operations.
executionGuidance: List commands when the exact command ID is unknown.
Prefer direct CR methods over palette commands when a typed capability exists.

scenarios.title: Transfer queue automation
scenarios.summary: Enqueue, monitor, retry, cancel, and clear local/remote transfers.
executionGuidance: Use list before mutating the queue so the user sees pending items.
Retry failed items before clearing unless the user asks for cleanup.
